summary: Iteration 22: Enhanced Reporting Modules & Currency Fixes - All tests passed. Backend: 17/17 API tests passed for new report endpoints. Frontend: All 3 new report tabs (Daily, Customers, Cashier) working with SAR currency. Mobile responsive views working.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> in <tbody>, <tr> in <span> - cosmetic issue from Emergent's internal rendering, does not affect functionality (known issue from previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful (ss@ssc.com)
Backend: GET /api/reports/daily-summary returns 200
Backend: Daily summary returns list with correct fields (date, sales, expenses, profit, cash, bank, online, credit, txn_count)
Backend: Daily summary sorted by date descending
Backend: Daily summary accepts start_date and end_date filters
Backend: GET /api/reports/top-customers returns 200
Backend: Top customers returns list with correct fields (id, name, phone, total_purchases, transaction_count, credit_given, credit_received, credit_outstanding)
Backend: Top customers sorted by total_purchases descending
Backend: GET /api/reports/cashier-performance returns 200
Backend: Cashier performance returns list with correct fields (user_id, name, email, role, branch, total_sales, transaction_count, cash_collected, bank_collected, avg_transaction)
Backend: Cashier performance sorted by total_sales descending
Backend: Existing reports still work (credit-sales, suppliers, branch-cashbank, item-pnl)
Frontend: Reports page loads with new tabs (Daily, Customers, Cashier)
Frontend: Daily tab shows bar chart + table with daily sales/expenses/profit
Frontend: Daily tab table uses SAR currency consistently
Frontend: Customers tab shows top customers ranked by purchases with credit info
Frontend: Customers tab uses SAR currency consistently
Frontend: Cashier tab shows user performance with sales/transactions/avg per transaction
Frontend: Cashier tab uses SAR currency consistently
Frontend: Overview tab uses SAR in all stat cards
Frontend: Chart tooltips show SAR currency (e.g., 'amount : SAR 193281')
Frontend: Sales page uses SAR in payment detail badges (cash: SAR, bank: SAR, credit: SAR)
Frontend: Dashboard heading uses responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
Frontend: Reports heading uses responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
Frontend: Sales heading uses responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
Frontend: Mobile view shows card-based layout for Daily Summary (8 mobile cards visible)
critical_code_review_comments: ReportsPage.jsx uses shared fmt() function for consistent SAR formatting: SAR ${Number(v).toLocaleString()}
New report endpoints use proper MongoDB queries with date filtering support
Daily summary aggregates sales and expenses by date with payment mode breakdown
Top customers sorted by total_purchases descending - includes credit tracking
Cashier performance shows per-user sales stats with branch info
Mobile responsive: hidden sm:block for tables, sm:hidden for card views
All Recharts tooltips use formatter={(v) => fmt(v)} for SAR formatting
Heading responsiveness: text-2xl for mobile, sm:text-4xl for desktop
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing sales, customers, and user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 complete. Three new report endpoints working: /api/reports/daily-summary, /api/reports/top-customers, /api/reports/cashier-performance. Frontend ReportsPage rewritten with 3 new tabs (Daily, Customers, Cashier). Currency consistently uses SAR throughout app ($ replaced). Responsive headings implemented with text-2xl sm:text-4xl pattern. Mobile views show card-based layouts instead of tables. React hydration warnings in tables are cosmetic only (Emergent's internal rendering). All existing report functionality preserved.
